stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Airbus A320 has a seating capacity of 162 passengers, and it is scheduled to operate a holiday charter Commercial Air transport flight within Europe. The loading manifest shows the following information:

Passengers An: 152 adults + 8 children + 5 infants (carried on the same seat of the parent)
Passenger baggage: 132 pieces
Freight: 1020 kg

If the operator uses standard masses for passengers (all adults) and checked baggage, the actual traffic load of this flight is…
